nasb.text: Multitudes, multitudes in the valley of decision! For the day of the Lord is near in the valley of decision.

esv.text: Multitudes, multitudes, in the valley of decision! For the day of the Lord is near in the valley of decision.

cnv.text: 無數的人群 齊集在判決谷， 因為耶和華的日子臨近了判決谷。

ccb.text: 千千万万的人聚集在审判谷， 因为耶和华的日子要临到那里。
